title: Generate loop hang
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
```
module top (input [7:0] data, output [7:0] out);
genvar n;
generate
    for (n=7; n>=0; n=n-1) begin
        assign out[n] = data[7-n];
    end
endgenerate
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

Connect eight wires in a seconds. 😁 
## Actual behavior

Run out of memory. 😅
